text: Hegseth to the press: Where is the coverage of the new spirit in the country?

🇺🇸 Articles of impeachment against Hegseth unveiled: - Unauthorized war against Iran - Violations of law of armed conflict - Reckless handling of sensitive military info - Obstruction of congressional oversight - Abuse of power - Conduct bringing disrepute upon US Impeachment push led by Rep. Ansari 'almost certainly won't go anywhere in the House this year' — CBS

Hegseth attacks the press again: I sat there in church, and I thought: our press are just like these Pharisees. Not all of you. Not all of you. But the legacy Trump-hating press—you’re politically motivated animus for President Trump nearly completely blinds you from the brilliance of our American warriors.

Hegseth attacks the press again: I just can’t help but notice the endless stream of garbage from the media. The relentlessly negative coverage. Sometimes, it’s hard to figure out what side some of you are actually on. It’s incredibly unpatriotic.

Hegseth: The U.S. military moved seamlessly from major combat operations to a world-class blockade. We can make that transition again very quickly and even more powerfully than ever. At the direction of President Trump, the war department will ensure that Iran never has a nuclear weapon—never. We’d prefer to do it the nice way, through a deal led by our great vice president and negotiating team, or we can do it the hard way.

Hegseth: As our negotiators have said, you, Iran, can choose a prosperous future, a golden bridge, and we hope that you do for the people of Iran. In the meantime, and for as long as it takes, we will maintain this blockade, successful blockade. But if Iran chooses poorly? Then they will have a blockade and bombs dropping on infrastructure, power, and energy. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and our friends over at Treasury are launching "Operation Economic Fury" as well, maximizing economic pressure.
Hegseth: Threatening to shoot missiles and drones at ships—commercial ships that are lawfully transiting international waters—that is not control. That’s piracy. That’s terrorism.
Hegseth: You like to say publicly, Iran, that you control the Strait of Hormuz, but you don’t have a Navy or real domain awareness. You can’t control anything.
Hegseth: We are reloading with more than ever before.
Hegseth: To the Iranian military and the IRGC: we know what military assets you are moving and where you are moving them to.
⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 U.S forces in Syria destroyed its last remaining military base in Al Hassakeh countryside before departing towards Iraqi Kurdistan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇺🇸 美国驻叙利亚军队在撤往伊拉克库尔德斯坦之前，摧毁了其在哈塞克省乡村仅存的最后一个军事基地。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 South Lebabon field report from Al-Manar correspondent Samer Haj Ali: — Eastern villages axis: From Blida to Mays al-Jabal, the situation remains unchanged. Enemy forces are refraining from showing themselves west of these towns, as they would be exposed to direct fire from the resistance. — Al-Hujair axis: The enemy is mainly positioned in the Taybeh project area. The situation remains unchanged in Deir Siryan, which the enemy has withdrawn from. The occupation forces attempted to advance from their positions between Al-Qantara and Taybeh toward the town of Al-Qantara once again. They established an outflanking route reaching the Al-Khazzan area in Al-Qantara. They were met with resistance fire, which destroyed four Merkava tanks and two armored personnel carriers. They failed to reach the Litani River from the direction of Taybeh or Wadi al-Hujair. — Khiam axis: The resistance maintains its capability to prevent the enemy from advancing toward the northern neighborhood. The enemy circulated reports claiming progress toward Debbin, but these reports are denied by field sources. The road from Debbin to Marjayoun and Ebl al-Saqi remains open for civilian movement. — Arkoub axis: The enemy has expanded its attacks in recent days, without any change in its ground deployment. Airstrikes targeted some of its villages such as Shebaa, Hebarieh, and Halta, accompanied by simultaneous artillery shelling.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 来自黎巴嫩南部Al-Manar通讯社记者Samer Haj Ali的战地报道：— 东部村庄轴线：从布利达（Blida）到梅斯贾巴尔（Mays al-Jabal），局势保持不变。敌军不敢在这些城镇以西露面，因为他们会暴露在抵抗力量的直接火力之下。— Al-Hujair轴线：敌军主要部署在Taybeh项目区。代尔西里扬（Deir Siryan）局势保持不变，敌军已从该地撤出。占领军再次试图从Al-Qantara和Taybeh之间的阵地向Al-Qantara镇推进。他们建立了一条到达Al-Qantara地区Al-Khazzan的侧翼路线。他们遭到了抵抗力量的火力回击，摧毁了四辆梅卡瓦坦克和两辆装甲运兵车。他们未能从Taybeh或Wadi al-Hujair方向到达利塔尼河。— 希亚姆（Khiam）轴线：抵抗力量保持着阻止敌军向北部社区推进的能力。敌军散布了关于向德宾（Debbin）推进的报道，但这些报道被战地消息来源否认。从德宾到马尔杰永（Marjayoun）和Ebl al-Saqi的道路仍对平民通行开放。— 阿尔库布（Arkoub）轴线：敌军近几天扩大了袭击范围，但地面部署没有任何变化。空袭针对了舍巴（Shebaa）、赫巴里耶（Hebarieh）和哈尔塔（Halta）等村庄，并伴有同步的炮击。

text: 🇪🇺 International Energy Agency Chief Fatih Birol: Europe has ‘maybe six weeks’ of Jet fuel left and warns of possible flight cancellations.
text_zh: 🇪🇺 国际能源署署长法提赫·比罗尔（Fatih Birol）：欧洲的航空燃油“可能只剩下六周”的储备，并警告可能出现航班取消的情况。

text: Open Source Intel Israeli officials tell Fox News they believe direct talks could lead to Lebanon joining the Abraham Accords. These were the first direct Israel-Lebanon talks in decades, held in Washington. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044746067602788483/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel REPORT: Lebanon’s President Aoun told Rubio he will not agree to speak with Netanyahu - Lebanese channel LBCI. This comes despite all the Lebanese rumors that no call has been scheduled. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044733239529455845/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）报道：黎巴嫩总统奥恩（Aoun）告诉卢比奥（Rubio），他不同意与内塔尼亚胡通话——黎巴嫩LBCI频道。Al Monitor报道称，奥恩总统取消了下午的日程安排，这表明预计稍后会与内塔尼亚胡通话，可能还有卢比奥国务卿加入。尽管黎巴嫩有传言称没有安排通话，但情况依然如此。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044733239529455845/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Yesterday, the U.S. Navy's Blue Angels and Air Force Thunderbirds performed a rare joint "Super Delta" formation flyover over Pensacola Beach, Florida on Tuesday. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044745429917507607/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：周二，美国海军“蓝天使”飞行表演队和空军“雷鸟”飞行表演队在佛罗里达州彭萨科拉海滩进行了一次罕见的联合“超级三角洲”编队飞行。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044745429917507607/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Significant fire on the territory of the Tuapse oil refinery located in southern Russia following Ukrainian strikes last night. Massive cloud of thick black smoke visible from several kilometers away, as well as on satellite imagery published by Radio Svoboda. Multiple fuel reservoirs on fire. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：昨晚乌克兰袭击后，位于俄罗斯南部的图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂领土发生重大火灾。从几公里外以及自由欧洲电台发布的卫星图像上可以看到巨大的浓黑烟云。多个燃料库起火。推文

text: Open Source Intel As far as I’m concerned, Israel isn’t at war with Lebanon. Israel is at war with the Hezbollah terror organization operating from Hezbollah controlled areas in Lebanon. I don’t see any reason for an Israeli ceasefire with “Lebanon” if there is no war, and I don’t see any reason for a ceasefire with Hezbollah based on the Islamic regime’s demands. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：就我而言，以色列并没有与黎巴嫩开战。以色列是在与在黎巴嫩真主党控制区活动的真主党恐怖组织开战。如果根本没有战争，我就看不出以色列与“黎巴嫩”停火的任何理由，我也看不出基于伊朗伊斯兰政权的要求与真主党停火的任何理由。推文

text: Open Source Intel Ukraine struck a Liberian-flagged oil tanker in Russian waters. The ship's Turkish captain was injured. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：乌克兰袭击了一艘在俄罗斯水域的利比里亚籍油轮。该船的土耳其籍船长受伤。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @Mpolymer : About to publish a piece on this. The crisis is real re Israel’s standing in the US. If u care about the alliance, and I do, it’s a break glass moment. Hint-saying it’s all antisemitism is intellectually lazy, and misses key point-Bibi’s policies hav led us directly to this moment. More to come… The direction of travel for Israel's standing in America: When Bernie Sanders introduced a resolution last summer to block arms sales to Israel, about half of Senate Democrats voted in favor; when he did so again now, roughly three-quarters of them did. https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/15/us/politics/senate-israel-arms-vote-iran-war.html - Gregg Carlstrom tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix转发 @Mpolymer：正准备发表一篇关于此的文章。关于以色列在美国的地位，危机是真实的。如果你关心这个联盟，而我关心，这是一个“打破玻璃”的时刻。提示：说这全是反犹太主义在智力上是懒惰的，并且忽略了关键点——比比（Bibi）的政策直接导致了我们走到这一刻。更多内容即将发布……以色列在美国地位的走向：当伯尼·桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）去年夏天提出一项阻止向以色列出售武器的决议时，大约一半的参议院民主党人投了赞成票；而当他现在再次这样做时，大约四分之三的人投了赞成票。https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/15/us/politics/senate-israel-arms-vote-iran-war.html - Gregg Carlstrom推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV: "Jesus told us, 'Blessed are the peacemakers,' but woe to those who manipulate religion in the very name of God for their own military, economic, or political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044743054880366665/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）教皇利奥十四世：“耶稣告诉我们，‘缔造和平的人有福了’，但那些以神的名义，为了自己的军事、经济或政治利益而操纵宗教，将神圣的东西拖入黑暗和污秽中的人，有祸了。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044743054880366665/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel In the last talks between U.S. and Iran, Iran walked away from the negotiating table to due U.S’s “maximalist demands” U.S Demands haven’t changed. Why is Islamic regime in Iran now thinking about heading back to the negotiating table? tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：在美伊最近的会谈中，伊朗因美国的“最大化要求”而退出了谈判桌。美国的要求没有改变。为什么伊朗伊斯兰政权现在考虑重返谈判桌？推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @NatashaBertrand : Iran’s new national security chief Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr's views "were so extreme that one of his subordinates—Qassem Soleimani, the notorious Quds Force leader later killed by the U.S.—temporarily quit in protest." WSJ: Iran’s Regime Has Changed—for the Worse The U.S.-Israeli attack fast-tracked the ascent of hard-liners and apocalyptic religious followers https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-radical-regime-change-a42d96ea tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces continue the genocide of Russian air defense assets using FP-2 middle-strike one-way attack drones. Among the targets: Pantsir S1, Osa-AKM and Buk-M1. In addition to that, Ukrainian strikes also hit a fuel depot and what was described as two temporary bases of Iskander-M short-range ballistic missile systems in the Crimea. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：乌克兰无人系统部队继续使用FP-2中程打击自杀式无人机对俄罗斯防空资产进行种族灭绝式的打击。目标包括：铠甲-S1（Pantsir S1）、黄蜂-AKM（Osa-AKM）和山毛榉-M1（Buk-M1）。此外，乌克兰的袭击还击中了一个燃料库，以及据称位于克里米亚的两个伊斯坎德尔-M（Iskander-M）短程弹道导弹系统的临时基地。推文

text: Open Source Intel IEA chief Fatih Birol: Europe has roughly six weeks of jet fuel left. Supply disruptions from the Iran conflict and Strait of Hormuz blockages could force flight cancellations. He called it "the largest energy crisis we have ever faced." - AP https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044739404602745049/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）国际能源署署长法提赫·比罗尔：欧洲的航空燃油大约只剩下六周的储备。伊朗冲突和霍尔木兹海峡封锁造成的供应中断可能迫使航班取消。他称这是“我们面临过的最大的能源危机”。- 美联社 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044739404602745049/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NATO Secretary General Rutte: "Winning is now a distant dream for Putin. He is understanding that his economy is in a bad shape." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044738769018917050/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 LBCI: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun has informed U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio that he will not agree to speak with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Lebanese President Joseph Aoun received a phone call from U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who thanked him for Lebanon’s efforts to reach a ceasefire and reaffirmed US support. Rubio said he is continuing efforts to achieve a ceasefire as a prelude to peace, security and stability in Lebanon, and expressed appreciation for President Aoun’s positions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 LBCI：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）已通知美国国务卿马可·卢比奥（Marco Rubio），他不同意与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通话。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩接到了美国国务卿马可·卢比奥的电话，卢比奥感谢黎巴嫩为达成停火所做的努力，并重申了美国的支持。卢比奥表示，他将继续努力实现停火，作为黎巴嫩和平、安全与稳定的前奏，并对奥恩总统的立场表示赞赏。 @wfwitness

text: Lebanon’s President, Joseph Aoun, told Marco Rubio that he would not speak with Netanyahu. Source: LBCI
text_zh: 黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩告诉马可·卢比奥，他不会与内塔尼亚胡通话。来源：LBCI

text: Pope Leo XIV: The world is being ravaged by a handful of tyrants.
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：世界正被少数暴君蹂躏。

text: 🇧🇪 ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 Belgium Seizes Two UK Shipments of Military Components Bound for Israel Two shipments from Britain of military components bound for Israel have been seized in Belgium, which has banned aircaft carrying military equipment for Israel from stopping in the country or using its airspace. The cargo, which arrived by truck on 23 March, contained fire control systems, laser targeting equipment, and spare parts for military aircraft. A criminal investigation has been opened.
text_zh: 🇧🇪 ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 比利时扣押了两批运往以色列的英国军事部件。两批运往以色列的英国军事部件在比利时被扣押，比利时已禁止载有以色列军事装备的飞机在该国停留或使用其领空。这些于3月23日通过卡车运抵的货物中包含火控系统、激光瞄准设备和军用飞机备件。目前已展开刑事调查。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun has cleared his afternoon schedule, indicating that a phone call with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu may take place – possibly a three‑way call with U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio. Aoun briefed Nabih…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 LBCI: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun has informed U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio that he will not agree to speak with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩已清理了下午的日程安排，这表明可能会与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡进行通话——可能是一次与美国国务卿马可·卢比奥的三方通话。奥恩向纳比·贝里（Nabih Berri）通报了情况……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 LBCI：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩已通知美国国务卿马可·卢比奥，他不同意与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡通话。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun has cleared his afternoon schedule, indicating that a phone call with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu may take place – possibly a three‑way call with U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio. Aoun briefed Nabih Berri, who advised him to reject the call. In return, a ceasefire – either full or limited – would be announced. Separately, the US embassy in Lebanon said Ambassador Michelle Isa met with President Trump and Secretary Rubio, who reaffirmed their commitment to the talks and to supporting Lebanon in restoring state control over weapons and sovereignty. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩已清理了下午的日程安排，这表明可能会与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡进行通话——可能是一次与美国国务卿马可·卢比奥的三方通话。奥恩向纳比·贝里通报了情况，后者建议他拒绝通话。作为回报，将宣布停火——无论是全面还是有限的。另外，美国驻黎巴嫩大使馆表示，大使米歇尔·伊萨（Michelle Isa）会见了特朗普总统和卢比奥国务卿，他们重申了对谈判的承诺，并支持黎巴嫩恢复国家对武器和主权的控制。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇹 Italy's L’Espresso Put a Photo on Its Cover That Israel HATES Now, the woman in the photo, Miaad Abu Al-Rub is telling the full story behind it herself.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自ResistanceTrench mirror：🇮🇹 意大利《快报》（L’Espresso）在其封面上刊登了一张以色列现在痛恨的照片。现在，照片中的女子Miaad Abu Al-Rub正在亲自讲述照片背后的完整故事。

text: 🇺🇸 Pete Hegseth quotes fake Pulp Fiction Bible verse in Pentagon 'prayer'.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）在五角大楼的“祈祷”中引用了伪造的《低俗小说》圣经经文。

text: Pope Leo XIV: The masters of war pretend not to know that it takes only a moment to destroy. Yet often a lifetime is often not enough to rebuild. They turn a blind eye to the fact that billions of dollars are spent on killing, on devastation, yet the resources needed for healing, education, and restoration are nowhere to be found.
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：战争的主宰们假装不知道毁灭只需要一瞬间。然而，往往一生都不足以重建。他们对数十亿美元被用于杀戮和破坏的事实视而不见，而治愈、教育和恢复所需的资源却无处可寻。

text: Pope Leo XIV: Jesus told us, “Blessed are the peacemakers,” but woe to those who manipulate religion in the very name of God for their own military, economic, or political gain, dragging that which is sacred into darkness and filth.
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：耶稣告诉我们，“缔造和平的人有福了”，但那些以神的名义，为了自己的军事、经济或政治利益而操纵宗教，将神圣的东西拖入黑暗和污秽中的人，有祸了。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ "No Idea About DEAD Americans, But Totally SUPPORT Helping Israel" — Rep. Jordan
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ “不知道死去的美国人，但完全支持帮助以色列” —— 乔丹（Jordan）众议员

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 A few hours ago, a fire broke out north of the Amka settlement due to a rocket strike.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 几个小时前，由于火箭弹袭击，阿姆卡（Amka）定居点北部发生火灾。

text: NEW: After more than 48 days of a near-total internet shutdown in Iran, limited access is beginning to return, with users now able to use Google search again. Source: RKhanizadeh (at X)
text_zh: 最新消息：在伊朗互联网近乎全面中断48天后，有限的访问权限开始恢复，用户现在可以再次使用谷歌搜索。来源：RKhanizadeh（X平台）

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The commander of the 52nd Battalion is still under anesthesia and on artificial respiration at Rambam Hospital, where he was injured during the battles in Bint Jbeil. A number of soldiers from the Paratroopers Brigade, who were also injured in the battle, are hospitalized there, including a doctor and a paramedic who were injured while evacuating the wounded in the clash area. — The Hebrew newspaper Yediot Ahronot
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 第52营指挥官在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）战斗中受伤，目前仍在兰巴姆（Rambam）医院接受麻醉和人工呼吸。在战斗中受伤的伞兵旅的多名士兵也住院治疗，其中包括一名在冲突地区撤离伤员时受伤的医生和一名护理人员。—— 希伯来语报纸《新消息报》（Yediot Ahronot）

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇹/🇵🇸🔻Italian magazine L'Espresso's cover image: "THE ABUSE The annexation of the West Bank, with soldiers complicit with the settlers. Gaza annihilated. The advance into Lebanon. The border breached in Syria. The war on Iran. Ethnic cleansing and massacres.…" 🇮🇹 Italy's L’Espresso Put a Photo on Its Cover That Israel HATES Now, the woman in the photo, Miaad Abu Al-Rub is telling the full story behind it herself.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇹/🇵🇸🔻意大利杂志《快报》的封面图片：“虐待：西岸的吞并，士兵与定居者同流合污。加沙被歼灭。向黎巴嫩推进。叙利亚边境被突破。对伊朗的战争。种族清洗和大屠杀……” 🇮🇹 意大利《快报》在其封面上刊登了一张以色列现在痛恨的照片。现在，照片中的女子Miaad Abu Al-Rub正在亲自讲述照片背后的完整故事。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 IDF announced that troops located more than 130 weapons inside a school in southern Lebanon during operations in the Bint Jbeil area. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage of the detonation of a school building in Bint Jbeil where dozens of Hezbollah weapons were found, according to the IDF. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，在宾特朱拜勒地区的行动中，部队在黎巴嫩南部的一所学校内发现了130多件武器。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 据以色列国防军称，这是宾特朱拜勒一所学校大楼被炸毁的画面，该校内发现了数十件真主党武器。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel If the U.S. forces Israel, due to Iran’s demands, to enter a ceasefire with Hezbollah, it would be very bad news. NOW 🔴 Iran's Ghalibaf: Ceasefire in Lebanon is just as important as ceasefire in Iran https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044734285601554784/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：如果美国因伊朗的要求而强迫以色列与真主党停火，那将是非常糟糕的消息。现在 🔴 伊朗卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）：黎巴嫩停火与伊朗停火同样重要 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044734285601554784/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇹🇷 Türkiye has announced plans to increase the number of its commando brigades. ▪️ The new brigades will be organized differently from existing units, tailored to modern threats and updated operational concepts. ▪️ Earlier reports suggest the expansion could include up to 15 additional brigades. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇹🇷 土耳其宣布计划增加其突击旅的数量。▪️ 新旅的组织方式将与现有部队不同，旨在应对现代威胁和更新的作战概念。▪️ 早期的报道表明，扩编可能包括多达15个额外的旅。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Minister Ofir Sofer, on reports of a ceasefire with Hezbollah: “If we turn residents of the frontline communities into hostages of Hezbollah, we have failed in our mission.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044737682446647609/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：以色列部长奥菲尔·索弗（Ofir Sofer）在谈到与真主党停火的报道时说：“如果我们把前线社区的居民变成真主党的人质，我们就没能完成我们的使命。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044737682446647609/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The International Energy Agency warns Europe could run out of jet fuel in just 6 weeks, AP reports. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）最新消息 🔴 据美联社报道，国际能源署警告称，欧洲的航空燃油可能在6周内耗尽。推文

text: Open Source Intel Unbelievable images of a U.S. KC-135R refueling aircraft, tail number 59-1444, which returned to the U.S. two days ago after operations in the Middle East as part of the campaign against Iran. According to reports, the aircraft was hit in an Iranian missile attack at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. Other aircraft were also damaged, including an E-3 AWACS, which was completely destroyed. The tanker made the entire journey back to the U.S., with stopovers, covered in tape from nose to tail. @ItayBlumental tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：令人难以置信的美国KC-135R加油机（尾号59-1444）的图像，该机在作为反伊朗行动的一部分在在中东执行任务后，于两天前返回美国。据报道，该机在沙特阿拉伯苏丹亲王空军基地遭到伊朗导弹袭击。其他飞机也受损，包括一架E-3预警机，该机被完全摧毁。这架加油机在贴满胶带的情况下，经停中转，完成了返回美国的整个航程。 @ItayBlumental 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 David Ignatius: 🗣️ Trump is simultaneously playing both the “good cop” and “bad cop” roles. 📌 He is not interested in prolonging the war and is focused on bringing it to an end. 📌 The naval blockade is being used as a tool of economic pressure rather than purely military force. 📌 His strategy is to push Iran to the point where it is forced to concede. 📌 The United States is also offering significant economic incentives, aiming to encourage Iran to accept a deal and move toward what officials describe as a “golden bridge” to the future. tweet
text_zh: Visioner转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 大卫·伊格内修斯（David Ignatius）：🗣️ 特朗普正在同时扮演“好警察”和“坏警察”的角色。📌 他对延长战争不感兴趣，并专注于结束战争。📌 海上封锁被用作经济压力的工具，而不是纯粹的军事力量。📌 他的策略是把伊朗逼到被迫让步的地步。📌 美国也提供了巨大的经济激励，旨在鼓励伊朗接受协议，并迈向官员们所说的通往未来的“黄金桥”。推文
